settings.heroTagline: Stockholm, Sweden · GMP Certified · ISCT Member
settings.heroTitle: The future of cellular therapy starts here.
settings.heroSubtitle: SAIHTEC AB develops and manufactures clinical-grade mesenchymal stromal cells, driving the translation of cell therapy from research to patients worldwide.
settings.seoTitle: SAIHTEC AB — Advanced Stem Cell Therapeutics · Stockholm, Sweden
settings.seoDescription: SAIHTEC AB develops and manufactures clinical-grade mesenchymal stromal cells. Founded in Sweden. GMP certified. Driving clinical translation worldwide.

about.title: Science-led. Patient-driven. Built in Sweden.
about.highlightQuote: Our purpose is to improve lives through safe and effective cell therapy — and to drive its clinical translation worldwide.
about.body: SAIHTEC AB is a Swedish biotechnology company founded by Dr. Nadir Kadri, an immunologist and stem cell researcher with over 20 years of experience at Karolinska Institutet, Stockholm. The company is built on two decades of peer-reviewed science and multiple investigator-initiated clinical trials, translating mesenchymal stromal cell (MSC) therapy from the laboratory to the clinic.
about.vision: To improve lives through safe and effective cell therapy.
about.mission: To drive clinical translation of cell therapies worldwide.

technology.title: MSC Isolation & Expansion
technology.description: Bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stromal cells isolated and expanded under rigorously controlled, serum-free conditions to ensure consistency, purity and potency across every batch.

technology.title: GMP Manufacturing
technology.description: End-to-end production of clinical-grade cell therapy products under EU Good Manufacturing Practice guidelines, ensuring every product meets the regulatory standards required for human use.

technology.title: Quality Control & Release
technology.description: Comprehensive release testing — sterility, viability, immunophenotyping and functional potency assays — performed before any product leaves our facility.

technology.title: Clinical Translation
technology.description: Direct collaboration with academic medical centres and clinical investigators to design and execute Phase I and Phase II trials, from protocol development to regulatory submission.

technology.title: Regulatory Affairs
technology.description: Expert navigation of EU ATMP classification, EMA submissions and CMC documentation, underpinned by direct experience as principal investigator on multiple approved clinical trials.

technology.title: Cryopreservation & Logistics
technology.description: Validated cryopreservation protocols and temperature-controlled logistics ensure cell viability and potency are maintained throughout distribution to clinical sites.

team.name: Dr. Nadir Kadri
team.title: PhD, VMD — Founder & CEO
team.bio: Immunologist and stem cell researcher. Assistant Professor at Karolinska Institutet. Elected member of the ISCT MSC Committee (2025–2028). Principal Investigator on multiple Phase I/II clinical trials. 57 peer-reviewed publications. ORCID: 0000-0003-2623-4094.

news.title: SAIHTEC AB announces strategic partnership with Saidal Group
news.excerpt: SAIHTEC AB has entered into a strategic collaboration with Saidal Group, Algeria's leading pharmaceutical company, to advance access to cell therapy across North Africa and the MENA region.
news.body: SAIHTEC AB has entered into a strategic collaboration with Saidal Group, Algeria's leading pharmaceutical company, to advance access to cell therapy across North Africa and the MENA region. This partnership marks a significant step in SAIHTEC's mission to drive the clinical translation of cell therapies worldwide.

news.title: Phase I/IIa trial results published in Stem Cell Research & Therapy
news.excerpt: New peer-reviewed publication reports safety and patient outcomes from the Phase I/IIa study evaluating local MSC administration in patients with vocal fold scarring and dysphonia.
news.body: Our latest clinical trial results have been published in Stem Cell Research & Therapy. The open Phase I/IIa study evaluated safety, patient-reported outcomes and voice function after surgery and local administration of mesenchymal stromal cells combined with voice training in patients with vocal fold scarring and dysphonia.

news.title: Dr. Nadir Kadri elected to ISCT MSC Committee 2025–2028
news.excerpt: SAIHTEC founder Dr. Nadir Kadri has been elected as one of 14 global experts to serve on the International Society for Cell & Gene Therapy MSC Committee for the 2025–2028 term.
news.body: We are proud to announce that Dr. Nadir Kadri has been elected to serve on the ISCT MSC Committee for the 2025–2028 term. This international committee of 14 experts shapes global standards and guidance for mesenchymal stromal cell therapy.

news.title: ISCT MSC Committee statement on FDA approval of allogenic bone-marrow MSCs
news.excerpt: Co-authored statement by the ISCT MSC Committee published in Cytotherapy, addressing the US FDA approval of allogenic bone-marrow mesenchymal stromal cells and its implications for the field.
news.body: The ISCT MSC Committee, of which Dr. Kadri is an elected member, has published a formal statement in the journal Cytotherapy regarding the US FDA approval of allogenic bone-marrow mesenchymal stromal cells. The statement provides guidance and commentary for the global cell therapy community.

items.a: SAIHTEC AB is a Swedish biotechnology company that develops and manufactures clinical-grade mesenchymal stromal cells (MSCs) for use in clinical research and therapeutic programmes. We combine GMP-certified manufacturing with deep scientific expertise to bridge the gap between research and patient care.

items.q: How can I collaborate with SAIHTEC?
items.a: We welcome partnerships with academic institutions, clinical investigators, hospitals and industry partners. Please reach out via our contact form to discuss collaboration opportunities.

items.q: What clinical areas are you working in?
items.a: Our investigator-initiated clinical trials have focused on Graft-versus-Host Disease (GvHD), Progressive Multiple Sclerosis, and vocal fold disorders. We are open to exploring new therapeutic areas where MSC biology offers clinical potential.

items.q: Are your manufacturing processes GMP certified?
items.a: Yes. Our manufacturing follows EU Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) guidelines under the ATMP regulatory framework, ensuring every product meets the standards required for clinical use in human subjects.

items.q: How do I contact SAIHTEC for investor inquiries?
items.a: Please use the contact form on this website and select 'Investor Relations' as the inquiry type. We will respond within two business days.

science_team.title: Research built by
science_team.subtitle: Our science is led by Dr. Nadir Kadri — an immunologist, veterinary physician and stem cell researcher with over 20 years at the intersection of basic research and clinical medicine.

lead.name: Dr. Nadir Kadri, PhD, VMD
lead.quote: I spent 20 years watching great science fail to reach patients. SAIHTEC exists to close that gap — with rigour, speed and no compromise on quality.
credentials: PhD in Immunology, Nantes University, France (2006)
Principal Investigator — GvHD, Multiple Sclerosis, Vocal Fold trials

investors.title: A compelling investment in
investors.body: SAIHTEC AB is positioned at the forefront of the cell therapy sector — combining 20 years of validated science, GMP manufacturing capability and an active clinical programme. We are open to discussions with investors who share our commitment to patient-centred innovation.

metrics.label: Years of Validated Science
metrics.desc: Built on peer-reviewed research and clinical trials

highlights.title: Validated Science
highlights.desc: 57 peer-reviewed publications and multiple completed investigator-initiated clinical trials provide a rigorous scientific foundation.

highlights.title: Clinical Experience
highlights.desc: Direct experience as PI on Phase I and Phase II trials across GvHD, Multiple Sclerosis and vocal fold indications.

highlights.title: Regulatory Expertise
highlights.desc: Deep familiarity with EU ATMP regulation, EMA submissions and CMC documentation from within the clinical trial process.
